description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a futuristic, urban-inspired outfit. The individual wears a high-collared jacket with asymmetrical shoulder armor, featuring bold diagonal stripes and layered fabric elements. His face is partially covered by a mask or scarf, and he has neatly styled, medium-length hair pulled back. The outfit includes fitted pants with utility pockets and matching gloves, as well as sturdy, high-top footwear with thick soles. The color palette is dominated by dark tones with striking yellow accents, giving the figure a modern, tactical appearance.
description: A futuristic adult male in a tactical, urban outfit with a high-collared jacket, face covering, and utility details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, high-collared jacket, and diagonal chest stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered shoulder armor and fitted silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket, utility pockets, and hair tied back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing glove and boot details.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic tactical jacket with asymmetrical shoulder armor, fitted pants, gloves, and utility accessories
